warnings: This cross-section (รูปตัด 2) cuts through the D-C-B-A row (bedroom 2, kitchen-prep, living/relax, porch), showing the roof's high/low bearing levels (+5.05/+4.05/+3.75) and referencing the eave details R1/R2 on sheet A-12 (pages 14 in this extraction).
Sibling section รูปตัด 1 is in _หน้า09_section1.json.
